---
title: "data-cleaning"
format: html
---

Data cleaning for portfolio project.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#loading all required packages
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-data
#reading in all data sets that will be used

waste_summary <- read_xlsx("data-raw/CountywideSummary.xlsx")

population_data_1 <- read_csv("data-raw/QuickFacts Mar-22-2026.csv")

population_data_2 <- read_csv("data-raw/QuickFacts Mar-22-2026 (1).csv")

```
```{r}
#| label: creating-population-data-set
#creating a single population data set with all cites and only rows that may be later used for this project

population_data <- population_data_1 |>
  drop_na("Fact") |>
  left_join(population_data_2, "Fact")
#add filtering to filter for census rows
```
